mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checked = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity, checked, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{checked}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart SET checked = #{checked}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checked = 1
